ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the component */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the component */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of component */,
  "in_stock" TEXT /* Current stock level of the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component available for sale */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the component */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the component in grams */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimension of the component in mm */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL of the datasheet for the component */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking the component in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the type (e.g., power management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse in square feet */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the warehouse manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being tracked */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the component is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the component in the warehouse */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_info ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the component in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, sales, customer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_info" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being transferred */,
  "from_warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse the component is being transferred from */,
  "to_warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse the component is being transferred to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component being transferred */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date the transfer was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_transfers_to_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_transfers_from_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_transfers_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_condition" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being tracked */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the component is stored */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the component (e.g., new, used, damaged) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in the specified condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_condition_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_condition_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_images_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
